# Conformance vectors

This directory will hold the Provetrail conformance vector suite: the golden valid and tampered records that operationally define the standard. A verifier is Provetrail-conformant at a tier if and only if it accepts every valid vector and rejects every invalid vector at that tier with the registered failure code.

**Status: not yet published.** The vectors are generated by a reference implementation against the v0.1.0 frozen format and the cryptographic layer, neither of which is final yet. The stable contract they will be generated against is the design in [`../CONFORMANCE.md`](../CONFORMANCE.md).

Vectors are never hand-authored. Valid vectors are produced by the real signing and chaining path; invalid vectors are a valid record with exactly one documented mutation applied. See `CONFORMANCE.md` Section 7 for the generation protocol.

Planned layout:

```
schema/   JSON Schemas for the manifest and vector files
keys/     fixed, test-only Ed25519 keypairs (NOT FOR PRODUCTION)
valid/    records a conformant verifier MUST accept
invalid/  records a conformant verifier MUST reject, one defect each
manifest.json
```
